name: Digvorzhak, King of Heavy Industry
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ドボク・ザーク
desc:
3 Level 5 monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; send the top 3 cards of your opponent's Deck to the GY, then, if any monsters were sent to the GY by this effect, destroy cards your opponent controls, up to the number of monsters sent.

3 Level 5 monsters

action: Sends from the top of your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
